overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban environment from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from an elevated billboard-lined walkway, descends through a basketball court, navigates narrow steam-filled alleys, and ends at a sunlit crosswalk under an overpass. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with strong sunlight and shadow contrasts.

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete platform past billboards and descending stairs toward lower level

notable_agents.action: walking down stairs ahead of camera toward basketball court

entered.detail: large advertisement display with Japanese text and female figure in black and white
yellow and black striped construction barriers
piles of garbage bags and debris

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway lined with large Nikola billboards and trash piles. The camera approaches and begins descending a stairway toward a lower basketball court area, following an NPC down the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor basketball court in urban canyon

events.description: exits stairway and enters open basketball court area

agents.ego_description: crossing the red basketball court among other pedestrians and players

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs playing basketball on the court
walking across the court wearing white tank top and red hair

entered.detail: red paved court surface with white boundary lines
multi-story building with teal colored facade
vertical glowing purple sign on building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit basketball court surrounded by tall buildings. Several NPCs are playing basketball or walking across the court. The camera moves through the crowd toward the far side of the court where a narrow alley entrance is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with steam vents

events.description: exits basketball court and enters narrow alleyway
passing through area with heavy ground steam and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alley, following an NPC with a large blue and white backpack

notable_agents.action: walking ahead carrying large blue and white striped backpack

entered.detail: damaged silver vehicle with open doors and steam coming from hood
thick white steam emitting from ground vents creating atmospheric haze
tall concrete walls with graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: Leaving the basketball court, the camera enters a narrow alleyway passing a wrecked car and steam vents. The path is flanked by high concrete walls and trash bins, with steam creating atmospheric effects. The camera follows an NPC with a distinctive blue backpack through this enclosed space.

events.description: exits narrow alley into covered walkway under large overpass
emerging from deep shadows into brighter sunlight near crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, approaching a street intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction wearing colorful outfit

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with green painted underside
large orange and gray support columns
striped construction barriers blocking part of the walkway
tall futuristic buildings visible through the overpass opening

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide covered walkway beneath a massive overpass with large support pillars. The camera moves past construction barriers and other pedestrians toward a sunlit intersection. The transition from the dark alley to this semi-covered area reveals distant skyscrapers and approaching traffic.

events.description: stopping at crosswalk as cars pass through the intersection
crosswalk clears and begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for vehicles to pass, then proceeding to cross the street

notable_agents.action: green sedan stopped at crosswalk waiting for pedestrians
silver car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
vintage-style green car with steam emitting from hood
hanging traffic signal above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy intersection under the overpass, the camera stops at a crosswalk as cars pass through. A green sedan waits at the crossing while pedestrians gather. The scene features strong sunlight streaming through the overpass columns, illuminating the yellow crosswalk stripes and creating a dramatic urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban walkway down through a series of enclosed spaces that eventually open into a sunlit city intersection. It begins along a concrete path lined with Nikola billboards and trash, descending a stairway to follow an NPC into a bright, open basketball court surrounded by towering buildings. As the camera moves through the crowd, the scene shifts from the open court into a narrow, atmospheric alleyway filled with steam vents, wrecked cars, and high concrete walls. The environment then expands from the dark alley into a wide covered walkway beneath a massive overpass, passing construction barriers as the view opens toward distant skyscrapers. Finally, the camera reaches a busy crosswalk where strong sunlight streams through the overpass columns, illuminating yellow stripes and waiting traffic in a dramatic urban finale.
